questions.question: Explain the concept of a hard fork in the context of Ethereum. Provide an example of a hard fork and its impact on the blockchain.
Describe the differences between a proof-of-work (PoW) and proof-of-stake (PoS) consensus algorithm. Choose an example of a blockchain that uses each algorithm.
What is smart contract programming, and how does it enable the creation of decentralized applications on the Ethereum blockchain? Provide an example of a simple smart contract.
